stories.headline: ‘The Bear’ Is Over: Here’s What Happens To Carmy, Sydney, Richie & More In Series Finale - Deadline
stories.summary: The Bear concluded its fifth and final season Thursday. Here's how things turned out for the main characters, including Carmy, Sydney and more.

stories.headline: King Charles reveals his personal tax bill. Spoiler alert: He’s very rich. - The Washington Post
stories.summary: The first-ever tax disclosure by a British monarch was partly intended to contain the damage from revelations about the finances of the king’s disgraced brother, Andrew.

stories.headline: Scott Pelley, Fired ‘60 Minutes’ Star, Signs With CAA - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: The talent agency will rep the journalist in all areas as he looks for life after CBS News, where he worked for 37 years.

stories.headline: ‘Love Island USA’ Islander Alannah Keyser Removed From Casa Amor After Resurfaced Video - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Keyser just made her grand entrance on season eight of the hit Peacock series as one of the new Casa Amor bombshells.

stories.headline: Ann Blyth, Who Played Joan Crawford’s Daughter in ‘Mildred Pierce,’ Dies at 98 - Variety
stories.summary: Ann Blyth, who was Oscar-nommed for her performance as the daughter of Joan Crawford's title character in "Mildred Pierce," died Wednesday.

stories.headline: King Charles won’t live in Buckingham Palace, reveals taxes - dw.com
stories.summary: Buckingham Palace has been the British monarch's official residence in London for nearly two centuries. But royal officials say King Charles and Queen Camilla won't reside there.

stories.headline: A Taylor Swift wedding at Madison Square Garden? New York remains in disbelief - CNN
stories.summary: A Taylor Swift wedding at Madison Square Garden? We asked everyone, and everyone’s finding it hard to believe.

stories.headline: Kylie Jenner former chef sues, alleges workload led to miscarriage - USA Today
stories.summary: Kylie Jenner is facing third lawsuit over workplace conditions by a former chef alleging the job caused her to have a miscarriage.
